address_lifecycle_check.name: address_lifecycle_check
address_lifecycle_check.value:
(is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL)
  OR
  (is_active = false AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

account_locked_check.name: account_locked_check
account_locked_check.value: account_locked_until IS NULL OR account_locked_until > created_at

idx_start_date.name: idx_start_date
idx_start_date.where: is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

idx_banners_position.name: idx_banners_position
idx_banners_position.where: is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

end_date_after_start_date_check.name: end_date_after_start_date_check
end_date_after_start_date_check.value: start_date IS NULL OR end_date IS NULL OR end_date > start_date

background_active_deleted_check.name: background_active_deleted_check
background_active_deleted_check.value: (is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL) OR (is_active = false AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

category_no_self_parent_check.name: category_no_self_parent_check
category_no_self_parent_check.value: parent_category IS NULL OR parent_category <> id

category_level_consistency_check.name: category_level_consistency_check
category_level_consistency_check.value: (parent_category IS NULL AND category_level = 1) OR (parent_category IS NOT NULL AND category_level > 1)

coupons_active_code.name: coupons_active_code
coupons_active_code.where: is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

coupon_lifecycle_check.name: coupon_lifecycle_check
coupon_lifecycle_check.value: (is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL) OR (is_active = false AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

delivery_delivered_state_chk.name: delivery_delivered_state_chk
delivery_delivered_state_chk.value: (is_delivered = true AND delivered_at IS NOT NULL) OR (is_delivered = false AND delivered_at IS NULL)

device_session_state_chk.name: device_session_state_chk
device_session_state_chk.value: (is_active = true AND logout_at IS NULL) OR (is_active = false AND logout_at IS NOT NULL)

notification_read_state_chk.name: notification_read_state_chk
notification_read_state_chk.value: (is_read = true AND read_at IS NOT NULL) OR (is_read = false AND read_at IS NULL)

notification_status_time_chk.name: notification_status_time_chk
notification_status_time_chk.value: (status = 'pending' AND sent_at IS NULL AND failed_at IS NULL) OR (status = 'sent' AND sent_at IS NOT NULL AND failed_at IS NULL) OR (status = 'failed' AND failed_at IS NOT NULL)

nutrients_non_negative_chk.name: nutrients_non_negative_chk
nutrients_non_negative_chk.value:
calories >= 0
  AND protein >= 0
  AND total_fat >= 0
  AND saturated_fat >= 0
  AND trans_fat >= 0
  AND carbohydrates >= 0
  AND sugar >= 0
  AND added_sugars >= 0
  AND dietary_fibre >= 0
  AND sodium >= 0
  AND cholesterol >= 0
  AND calcium >= 0
  AND iron >= 0
  AND potassium >= 0
  AND vitamin_a >= 0
  AND vitamin_b >= 0
  AND vitamin_c >= 0

orders_cancel_state_chk.name: orders_cancel_state_chk
orders_cancel_state_chk.value:
(order_status <> 'cancelled' AND cancelled_at IS NULL AND cancelled_by IS NULL)
    OR
    (order_status = 'cancelled' AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)

orders_payment_link_chk.name: orders_payment_link_chk
orders_payment_link_chk.value:
(payment_status = 'pending' AND payment_id IS NULL)
    OR
    (payment_status <> 'pending' AND payment_id IS NOT NULL)

partners_verification_state_chk.name: partners_verification_state_chk
partners_verification_state_chk.value:
(is_verified = false AND verified_by IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_verified = true AND verified_by IS NOT NULL)

partners_rating_range_chk.name: partners_rating_range_chk
partners_rating_range_chk.value: average_review_rating IS NULL OR (average_review_rating BETWEEN 0 AND 5)

payments_failure_state_chk.name: payments_failure_state_chk
payments_failure_state_chk.value:
(is_failed = false AND failure_reason IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_failed = true AND failure_reason IS NOT NULL)

payments_completion_chk.name: payments_completion_chk
payments_completion_chk.value:
(payment_status IN ('pending','authorized') AND completed_at IS NULL)
    OR
    (payment_status IN ('captured','refunded','failed') AND completed_at IS NOT NULL)

product_rating_range_chk.name: product_rating_range_chk
product_rating_range_chk.value: (average_review_rating IS NULL OR average_review_rating BETWEEN 0 AND 5) AND (average_rating IS NULL OR average_rating BETWEEN 0 AND 5)

product_tax_consistency_chk.name: product_tax_consistency_chk
product_tax_consistency_chk.value: (is_taxable = false AND tax_amount = 0) OR (is_taxable = true AND tax_amount >= 0)

refund_approval_state_chk.name: refund_approval_state_chk
refund_approval_state_chk.value:
(is_approved = false AND approved_by IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_approved = true AND approved_by IS NOT NULL)

relatives_lifecycle_chk.name: relatives_lifecycle_chk
relatives_lifecycle_chk.value:
(is_active = true AND is_deleted = false AND deleted_at IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_active = false AND is_deleted = true AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

relatives_dob_past_chk.name: relatives_dob_past_chk
relatives_dob_past_chk.value: dob IS NULL OR dob < now()

returns_approval_state_chk.name: returns_approval_state_chk
returns_approval_state_chk.value:
(is_approved = false AND approved_by IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_approved = true AND approved_by IS NOT NULL)

reviews_approval_state_chk.name: reviews_approval_state_chk
reviews_approval_state_chk.value:
(is_approved = false AND approved_by IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_approved = true AND approved_by IS NOT NULL)

reviews_status_approval_consistency_chk.name: reviews_status_approval_consistency_chk
reviews_status_approval_consistency_chk.value:
(status = 'approved' AND is_approved = true)
    OR
    (status <> 'approved' AND is_approved = false)

sessions_lifecycle_chk.name: sessions_lifecycle_chk
sessions_lifecycle_chk.value:
(session_status = 'active' AND logout_at IS NULL)
    OR
    (session_status IN ('revoked','expired') AND logout_at IS NOT NULL)

users_provider_user_id_unique_idx.name: users_provider_user_id_unique_idx
users_provider_user_id_unique_idx.where: auth_provider != 'local' AND provider_user_id IS NOT NULL AND is_deleted = false

users_delete_state_chk.name: users_delete_state_chk
users_delete_state_chk.value:
(is_deleted = false AND deleted_at IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_deleted = true AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL)

vendors_delete_state_chk.name: vendors_delete_state_chk
vendors_delete_state_chk.value:
(is_deleted = false AND deleted_at IS NULL)
    OR
    (is_deleted = true AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL)
